chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 87 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1822/2024 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.1823/2024 12.11.2025 Mr. Atta Muhammad Qureshi, advocate for the applicant Learned counsel states that rectification has already been allowed by the learned Tribunal, therefore, present reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
